modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Faculty unable to view class rosters and waitlist information

full_description_text: Faculty are trying to access class rosters for summer and Fall19 courses. They want to see student listings with pictures. There are issues with checking current enrollment and viewing waitlist details. This is affecting their ability to manage course information effectively.

description: Faculty are trying to access class rosters for summer and Fall19 courses. They want to see student listings with pictures. There are issues with checking current enrollment and viewing waitlist details. This is affecting their ability to manage course information effectively.
